findings.issue: Potential off-by-one error in deadline calculation.
findings.repro: If the current date is exactly at midnight, the deadline calculation might be incorrect due to rounding.
If `g.evaluation` is null or undefined, trying to access `g.evaluation.eligibility_pass` will throw an error.
